message:
fix(genesis,ratelimit): use valid keys in tests, handle past-reset timestamps

- genesis: replace invalid-key tests ([0xFF;32]) with valid-key roundtrip
  tests, since certain Ed25519 implementations may accept those bytes as
  valid compressed points — testing with a properly generated key is more
  reliable and avoids implementation-dependent behavior
- ratelimit/headers: set reset_seconds to 0 when the x-ratelimit-reset
  epoch timestamp is in the past, rather than leaving it as None —
  callers can now distinguish "window expired, retry immediately" from
  "no reset information available"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
